note: Official PolyU JUPAS page confirms the 2026 four-year Building Engineering and Management degree, Common Year One, 121 academic credits plus 2 training credits, work-integrated education and accreditation. Publicly searchable coded subject records belong to separate SPEED or senior-year programmes with different programme codes and entry structures, so they cannot be assigned to JS3791. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a current four-year coded curriculum source is publicly available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and programme pages confirm the 2026 four-year Surveying degree, Common Year One, five discipline choices, compulsory work-integrated education, capstone project and broad curriculum structure. The publicly accessible pages direct students to the department for subject information but do not publish a current stable subject-code table or semester-by-semester course rows. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a publicly accessible coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS page describes the 2026 entry scheme, awards, curriculum structure and selected subject names, but does not publish stable subject codes or semester-by-semester course rows on the public page. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS page and BME programme/curriculum pages describe the 2026 entry award, 120-credit structure and broad requirement groups for Sports Science and Technology, but the public pages do not publish stable subject codes or a course table for the programme. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS page and BEEE programme/brochure pages describe the 2026 entry award, 120-credit plus 11 training-credit structure, curriculum progression and broad building sciences subjects, but the public pages and image-based brochure do not publish stable subject codes or a course table. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS page and ARCH programme page describe the 2026 entry award, 120-credit plus 2 training-credit structure, 87-credit major subjects, GUR, free electives, capstone and broad architectural competence areas, but the public pages do not publish stable subject codes or a course table. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and FSN programme pages describe the 2026 entry scheme, common Year One, two major awards, 120-credit structure, WIE and broad subject areas. The linked programme requirement document redirects to PolyU single sign-on, so the public source does not provide a verifiable coded course table. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a publicly accessible coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS, School of Nursing programme-structure pages and the 2025 programme pamphlet confirm the five-year Mental Health Nursing curriculum, course areas, clinical practice and graduation credits. The publicly accessible materials list subject names but do not publish a current, complete coded subject table tied to JS3337. Older exchange and examination records cannot be used as the current curriculum. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a current coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and HTI pages describe the 2026 entry programme, four-year curriculum progression, 126 academic credits plus 10 clinical/field credits, clinical attachment and current subject names by year. The public subject-information link does not provide a current coded subject table; searchable coded records are from older curricula and cannot be treated as the 2026 curriculum. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a current coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and School of Design pages confirm the 2026 Design Scheme, its common Year 1 foundation, Year 2 clusters and nine Year 3-4 specialisms. The public structure and specialism pages give curriculum descriptions and credit groups but do not publish a current coded subject table. The specialisms have dedicated pathways, so subjects from older or individual-track materials must not be assigned across the scheme. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a current coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and HTI pages confirm the 2026 four-year Radiography curriculum, its academic and clinical components, 116 academic credits plus 26 clinical/field credits, and the Medical Imaging and Radiation Therapy concentrations. The linked subject-information page does not provide a current coded subject table. Searchable examination records are from older curricula and cannot be treated as the 2026 curriculum. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a current coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and Rehabilitation Sciences pages confirm the 2026 four-year Occupational Therapy curriculum, named subject areas by year, 130 credits including 24 clinical/field credits, and five clinical-placement blocks. The public sources do not provide a current complete coded subject table. Searchable examination records cannot alone establish the 2026 curriculum, so keep this programme as index/source-only until a current coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and School of Nursing pages confirm the 2026 five-year Nursing curriculum, 117 academic credits plus 35 clinical/field credits and its broad subject areas. A publicly listed coded table belongs to the separate three-year senior-year-admission programme, with different entry requirements and credits, so it cannot be assigned to JS3648. Keep the five-year programme as index/source-only until a current coded curriculum source is available.
